creator: kristinacors
caption: Watch until the end if you want a free flight to Miami! ✈️ #travelbucketlist #travelhacks #travelhack #flighthack #nyc

transcription.text: It's cold in New York City, and you know what every New Yorker could use? A free flight to Miami to get some sun while we're waiting for spring. So let me show you how to get a free flight just by signing up for T-Mobile, HelloFresh, and getting some makeup from Anastasia. So how does this work? If you shop through the American Airlines shopping portal right now, you earn 5,900 miles when you sign up for T-Mobile 5G home internet, 2,400 miles when you sign up for HelloFresh, and 2,000 miles when you spend $200 at Anastasia. And that's because Anastasia is offering 10 miles for every dollar you spend there. And if you didn't know, you can book a flight from New York to Miami for just 8,500 points. To do this and earn the points, all you have to do is create an American Airlines Advantage account, which is super easy and only takes two minutes. And don't worry, you don't need to sign up for their credit card in order to do this. Once you have that, then just head to the Advantage eShopping website, make sure you're logged in, and shop the three brands I just told you about. So what do you think about this deal? Would you do this? Let me know in the comments, and follow to learn about the travel hacks no one teaches you.
